tagline: Backyards were made for back floats.

trust_badges.badge_1: Dan's Best of the Best Award

hero.headline:
Award-Winning Pools for the Hamptons
& North Fork
hero.subheadline: For nearly 40 years, Islandia Pools has designed and built resort-quality pools, spas, and backyards for over 5,000 families. From custom design to weekly maintenance, we handle everything so you can simply enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs,<br class="hidden md:block"> All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the last chemical check, Islandia Pools handles every aspect of pool and spa ownership. Design, construction, maintenance, and supplies — one team, one call.

cards.title: Custom Pool Design
cards.description: Work with our award-winning design team to create the backyard retreat you've always imagined. We collaborate with homeowners and architects to deliver stunning, resort-quality pools.

cards.title: Pool Construction
cards.description: Expert installation from excavation to first splash. Our experienced crews build pools that last decades, using premium materials and proven construction methods.

cards.title: Spa Design & Installation
cards.description: Hot tubs and spas designed to complement your backyard oasis. We create relaxing spa spaces tailored to your vision, from intimate soaking tubs to full spa retreats.

cards.title: Maintenance & Repairs
cards.description: Keep your pool pristine season after season with our comprehensive maintenance and repair services. Weekly cleaning, equipment checks, and fast repairs when you need them.

cards.title: Retail Pool & Spa Store
cards.description: Visit our Riverhead store at 108 Fishel Ave for professional-grade BioGuard chemicals, equipment, accessories, and expert advice. Open Mon-Fri 9-6, Sat 9-4.

cards.title: Renovations & Upgrades
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with resurfacing, new tile, LED lighting, energy-efficient equipment, and modern automation systems.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision. We'll visit your property, discuss your ideas, and provide a clear, honest estimate — no pressure, no surprises.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our experienced team handles every detail from award-winning design to expert construction. We keep you informed at every stage and stay on schedule.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your backyard paradise is ready. And when you need maintenance, chemicals, or anything else, we're right here in Riverhead — just one call away.

about.label: Why Long Island Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Doing Things Right
about.description: In 1987, our founding family couldn't find a pool company they could trust — so they started their own. With over a decade of prior experience, they built Islandia Pools on quality, integrity, and genuine care. Now led by owner Dave Freeborn, we work with hundreds of homeowners and architects across the North Fork and the Hamptons every year, delivering award-winning pools, spas, and resort-quality backyards. Nearly four decades and over 5,000 customers later, we're still treating every project like it's our own.

features.title: 39 Years of Trusted Experience
features.description: Since 1987, we've built a reputation for quality craftsmanship and honest service that families across Long Island rely on.

features.title: Award-Winning Designs
features.description: Recognized by Dan's Best of the Best, our designs transform ordinary backyards into extraordinary retreats on the North Fork and Hamptons.

features.title: Full-Service, One Call
features.description: Design, construction, maintenance, and retail — everything you need for your pool and spa, all from one experienced team.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. Contact us for a free consultation and honest estimate tailored to your property and vision.

guarantee.headline: Our Quality Promise to You
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build, every spa we install, and every service visit. If something isn't right, we'll make it right — that's the commitment we've upheld for nearly 40 years and over 5,000 customers. Your satisfaction isn't just a goal, it's our reputation.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool projects take 8-12 weeks from design approval to completion, depending on complexity and permitting. We'll give you a clear timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool projects?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer financing through LightStream, making it easier to bring your dream pool to life. Competitive rates and flexible terms are available. Ask us during your consultation for details.

faqs.question: What areas on Long Island do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the North Fork, the Hamptons, Riverhead, Calverton, and surrounding East End communities in Suffolk County. We've been the trusted pool professionals for this region since 1987.

faqs.question: Can I buy pool chemicals and supplies from you?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Visit our retail store at 108 Fishel Ave in Riverhead. We carry professional-grade BioGuard products, equipment, accessories, and more. Our staff can test your water and recommend exactly what you need. Open Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 9am-4pm.

faqs.question: Do you handle maintenance and repairs too?
faqs.answer: Yes — we're a full-service operation. From weekly cleaning and chemical balancing to equipment repairs and seasonal openings and closings, we keep your pool in pristine condition year after year.

testimonials.name: Paul Cesario
testimonials.text: I made the right decision! From start to finish, things went smooth and right on schedule. As a business owner myself, I was really impressed with their whole operation. They put their customers first and handle concerns always fast.

testimonials.name: Dr. Michelle I.
testimonials.text: They were professional, knowledgeable, and attentive. They helped us design our backyard oasis with clear pricing throughout the process.

testimonials.name: Tracy B. Levy
testimonials.text: Dave, Cheryl and the entire crew at Islandia Pools are professionals. They employ great field people and are responsive, knowledgeable and dependable. This is a business that cares about its customers.

contact.headline:
Ready for the Backyard
You've Always Wanted?
contact.subtitle: Get a free consultation and honest estimate. No pressure, no obligation — just 39 years of experience ready to help you create something beautiful.

footer.description: Family-owned pool and spa professionals. Serving Long Island's East End since 1987.
